modrinthProject.description: Ars Nouveau Integration for Blood Magic. Spiritual successor of Tome of Blood by SadieLuna
modrinthProject.body:
<center>

![Tome of Blood: Rebirth](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/W5NORTN9/images/24fe425be28631c6acb121e1ef37c57f5a421870.png)

[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/911546?style=for-the-badge&label=Curseforge&logo=curseforge&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tome-of-blood-rebirth)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/W5NORTN9?style=for-the-badge&label=Modrinth&logo=modrinth&color=1bd96a)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tome-of-blood-rebirth)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/743298050222587978?style=for-the-badge&label=Discord&logo=discord&color=404eed)](https://discord.gg/y7TMXZu)
[![License: LGPL v3](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-LGPL%20v3-blue.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl-3.0)

</center>

Adds compatibility between [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
and [Blood Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-magic) in the form of new Spell books and Equipment!

### Features :

- Tome of Blood - Spell books that use LP to cast instead of mana
- Glyph of Sentient Harm - Does sentient damage and scales with the amount Demon will
- Heretic's Armor - a new armor that mixes Blood magic living armor with Ars Nouveau Perk System
- Mint Tea - item to help LP generation early game
- New perks and living armor upgrades!

For a full overview, check the `Tome of Blood` section of the Worn Notebook (Ars Nouveau Patchouli Guidebook)

### License

- All the code in this repository is under **LGPLv3 License**.

modrinthProject.body:
![Animus Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamDman/Animus/1.20.1/src/main/resources/assets/animus/textures/misc/animus_logo_256.png)

Putting more Magic in your Blood Magic!

**Animus** dramatically expands Blood Magic with powerful new sigils, rituals, weapons, and deep integration with your favorite magic mods. Whether you're a solo blood mage or playing with friends on a server, Animus has something for you.   [Discord](https://discord.gg/TRxaXaYy42) *** ## Play With Friends - Share Your LP! **Key of Binding** lets you share your Life Essence with teammates! 1. Bind a Key of Binding to your Soul Network 2. Give the bound key to a friend 3. They hold it in their offhand or curio slot 4. Now their sigils and bound items draw from YOUR LP! Perfect for servers where one player focuses on LP generation while others focus on combat. Power your entire team's sigils, bound weapons, and rituals from a single massive Soul Network!   *** ## New Sigils Portable tools powered by your Soul Network: * **Sigil of Transposition** - Store and place blocks, or bind to a Teleposer to teleport entities across dimensions * **Sigil of the Storm** - Summon lightning bolts at will * **Sigil of Consumption** - Convert everything you touch into corrupting AntiLife * **Sigil of Heavenly Wrath** - Levitate enemies then drop them for devastating fall damage * **Sigil of Temporal Dominance** - Accelerate block entities up to 32x speed (furnaces, spawners, anything!) * **Sigil of Equivalency** - Mass-replace blocks in a configurable radius - terraforming made easy * **Sigil of the Free Soul** - Enter ghost mode for scouting, PLUS works as a Totem of Undying! * **Sigil of Remedium** - Automatically cleanse negative potion effects * **Sigil of Reparare** - Passively repair damaged items in your inventory * **Sigil of Nature's Leach** - Consume nearby plants to restore hunger * **Sigil of the Phantom Chain** - Capture entities into Mob Souls and release them elsewhere * **Sigil of the Fast Builder** - Accelerated block placement speed *** ## New Rituals Powerful ceremonial magic for automation and world manipulation: * **Ritual of Sol / Luna** - Place or remove light sources across a massive area * **Ritual of Persistence** - Keep chunks loaded in an area * **Ritual of Culling** - Upgraded Well of Suffering that autokills with LP generation * **Ritual of Unmaking** - Disenchant items onto books * **Ritual of Peaceful Beckoning** - Spawn passive animals * **Ritual of Steadfast Heart** - Buffs you and allies with regenerating bonus hearts * **Ritual of Reparare** - Repairs items placed above the ritual * **Ritual of Serenity** - Prevents hostile mob spawns in a large radius * **And many more…** *** ## Imperfect Rituals Quick rituals using the Imperfect Ritual Stone - just place a block on top and activate: * **Regression** (Bookshelf) - Remove repair costs from items * **Enhancement** (Amethyst) - Upgrade ALL enchantments by 1 level * **Boundless Skies** (Ancient Debris) - 10 minutes of creative flight! * **Clear Skies** - Stop rain and thunder instantly *** ## Weapons & Tools * **Iron & Diamond Spears** - Throwable javelins you can pick back up * **Bound Spear** - Soul-bound, returns to you, strikes in an area * **Sentient Spear** - Scales with demon will, AoE effects based on will type * **Sentient Shield** - Blocking grants buffs, +30% demon will gain * **Sanguine Diviner** - Diagnose altar issues, show ritual info, auto-place upgrades * **Special Malum ScytheS** - Runed Sentient Scythe and the _Hand of Death_ *** ## Tier 6 Blood Altar Ascend beyond the base game: * **Crystallized Demon Will Blocks** - New altar component enabling Tier 6! * **Willful Stone** - 16 colors, completely unbreakable to anyone but the owner * **Transcendent Blood Orb** - Massive LP storage for the ultimate blood mage *** ## Corruption & Nature * **AntiLife** - Corrupting fluid created when lightning strikes Life Essence. Spreads and consumes! * **Blood Trees** - Grow living wood from blood-infused saplings. The apples restore hunger AND LP! *** ## Deep Mod Integration Animus seeks bridges Blood Magic with other magic systems: ### Iron's Spellbooks * Cast ANY spell using Life Essence instead of mana * Blood-Infused Spellbook with reduced costs and LP regen * Sanguine Scrolls - reusable spell scrolls in 5 tiers * Sigil of Crimson Will - boost spell damage with demon will * Living Armor gains XP from spellcasting! * Ritual of Arcane Mastery - upgrade spell levels ### Botania * Sigil of Boundless Nature - LP-powered mana for Botania tools * Rune of Unleashed Nature - altar rune powered by Botania mana * Diabolical Fungi - converts demon will to mana * Ritual of Floral Supremacy - doubles mana flower output! ### Ars Nouveau * Arcane Rune - altar rune powered by Source * Ritual of Source Vitaeum - converts LP into Source * Living Armor Source Attunement upgrades ### Malum * Runic Sentient Scythe - 30% faster, harvests souls for Malum * Hand of Death - ultimate soul reaper with lifesteal and execute ### More to Come! * We still have plans to add more and we're open to ideas! *** ## In-Game Guide Animus includes the **Codex Animus** - a comprehensive Patchouli guidebook covering all features, recipes, and mechanics. Craft it to get started and never have to tab out for a guide! *** _Embrace the sanguine arts. Ascend beyond mortality. Share your power with allies. This is the way of Animus._

Adds various things for rendering and simplifying development.

Post-process shaders  
Shaders support  
Custom player skin and item skin system  
Custom panoramas and menu  
Creative sub-tab system  
Built-in resource & data packs  
Modded book support  
Easy networking  
Screenshake  
Raycast  
Item particles  
Item animations  
Custom item models  
Attribute modifiers  
Music modifiers  
Loot modifiers  
Custom languages

Custom fonts  
...and many other features to simplify development

Lightning bolt effect

### Requires:
[Fluffy Fur](https://modrinth.com/mod/fluffy-fur) and [CuriosApi](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

### [The Fluffy Village](https://fluffy-village.dev/pages/eng/creations/wizards_reborn.html)

# About:

"Wizard's Reborn" - a mod about magic in the style of alternative 1930s.  

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/logo.png)

In Earth's crust you can find odd blue crystals, which brings back memories about well-forgotten past.  
In search for knowledges you create different machines and research spells.  

Looks like all answers is in this scuffed book, which fell on my head, because only it will show me the way.  

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/magical_origins.png)

#

From these crystals I was able to obtain primordial energy, which my silly book calls "Wissen". This ether-like substance brings to life various magical mechanisms.  

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/wissen_mechanisms.png)

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/arcane_iterator.png)

#

To fully reveal ancient potential, magic is not enough, so I've created this steam construction - Alchemy Machine!  

**How to build!**  

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/alchemy_machine.png)

# **How NOT to build!!!**  

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/how_not_to_build.png)

#

## But that's not all I wanted to tell you, so try to explore this perishable world by yourself!    

The mod is in very early alpha, with a lot of different content planned for the future!  
You can visit our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/cKf55qNugw)** to suggest your ideas or receive news about development.

#

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_reborn/the_gang.png)

<details>
<summary>The Silly Council will decide your fate,</summary>

meow

</details>

modrinthProject.title: Embers Rekindled
modrinthProject.description: A Dwarven-themed Tech/Magic Mod.
modrinthProject.body:
Embers is best described as a dwarven magic tech mod. It features a smattering of magical and technical content, from staples such as ore doubling and item transport to alchemy and magical ray guns. All centered around the core mechanic of Ember, a form of power that you must extract from the world's core near bedrock.

To get started, you will first need to find an Ancient Golem:

![golem](https://github.com/RCXcrafter/EmbersRekindled/blob/rekindled/images/golem.png?raw=true)

Slay the golem, and use his drops to craft the Ancient Codex. This will guide you through the rest of the mod.

The 1.20.1 port is mostly a direct port of the 1.12.2 version but some things are significantly or subtly different. The Ancient Codex has been updated to reflect all the changes so make sure to make one even if you were already familiar with the mod.

Here is a list of most of the changes, check the Ancient Codex for more details:
- Linking emitters and receivers no longer requires shift-clicking and you click on the emitter first now
- All blocks that are not full blocks can be waterlogged
- Ember Receptors no longer say they accept ember if they're over half full, giving them plenty of buffer for long distance connections
- The mechanical core and machine accessor have been merged into one block
- The bin is now made of lead since it's related to item transport/storage
- The checkmarks in the codex have been replaced with a dawnstone dot on uncompleted entries
- The mixer centrifuge now has small holes on the side to show what fluids are inside
- Beam splitters no longer have an internal ember buffer, they directly split any ember fed into them and they can be placed on walls
- Stampers now stop working when they're trying to output to a bin that's full
- The pressure refinery now gives a maximum of 3x multiplication instead of 6x
- The ember bore now requires at least 3 bedrock touching the blades to mine ember
- The ember cluster is now worth 4400 ember instead of 3600
- Alchemy has been completely redesigned, you now have to match aspecti to ingredients and alchemical waste gives hints similar to the ones you get in the game mastermind
- The ember injector can now be placed up to one block away from a crystal seed to allow picking up drops with 6 injectors on one crystal
- Metal crystal seeds now generate in small ruins instead of being craftable, their metal type can be changed with an alchemy recipe
- Catalytic plugs now run on steam or dwarven gas, wildfire stirlings can run on dwarven gas too
- The limit on most machine upgrades has been removed and replaced with decreased effectiveness above a certain amount
- Machine upgrades can now be proxied up to 3 blocks away from a machine with mechanical cores, most upgrades lose effectiveness with distance
- The field chart can now be toggled between displaying the current ember and base ember instead of displaying both at the same time
- Atmospheric gauges can now be placed in the world and a comparator can read them
- Resistances from inflictor gems are now added up across all armor pieces
- Caminite rings now always place in the center even when you click on the edge of a reservoir or camanite ring
- The recipes for item and fluid transfers now produces 3 transfers instead of 1
- The question mark in the bottom left of the codex now glows to draw attention to it
- Ember production now generates 1/4th of the steam so boilers don't instantly explode on pressure refineries
- The beam cannon requires at least 1000 ember in it to fire, which is the minimum required to initate alchemy
- The cinder staff and blazing ray now allow you to walk at normal speed while charging, sprinting is still prevented

Credits:  
RCXcrafter: Current Maintainer  
BordListian: Maintainer for 1.12.2  
Elucent: Original author  
TechnoMysterio & KomradeSpectre: Sounds

modrinthProject.title: Aetherworks Refracted
modrinthProject.description: Stars fall, lights dim; An Embers Rekindled addon, adding an end-game material and wondrous tools.
modrinthProject.body:
Aetherworks is an addon to Embers Rekindled, adding a new material, Aetherium, and powerful end-game tools made from it, Features ancient meteorites to find, and a large multiblock forge to craft with. See the Ancient Codex's new "Reflections of the Sun" page for information.

This 1.20.1 port has changed quite a lot about the mod, such as most of the code being completely rewritten, how aetherium is processed, how you aquire aetherium shards, many sprites, and even what some of the tools do. Old mod spotlight videos for the original Aetherworks aren't very accurate to this version.

Here's a (pretty vague) list of all the changes in this port:

- A variety of numbers changes and added config options.
- Removed or reworded many of the tooltips.
- Fixed block models in the inventory looking terrible.
- The Moonlight Harvester structure no longer requires Control Matrices to function. Instead, each Control Matrix added will increase aetherium production.
- Aetherium refinement reworked as electrum and bronze no longer exists by default.
- Added the Aetherium Aspectus, required to perform aetherium-based alchemy.
- Added the Tool Forge, the final step in crafting aetherium tools, instead of just smushing the parts together in a crafting grid. (which was boring!)
- Added the "Moongaze" effect, dealing slow void damage over time. It is applied by aetherium weapons and by touching aetherium fluid. Can also be put into a vessel gem!
- Reworked the Pickaxe of the Molten Depths to veinmine a strip mine pattern and place glimmers as it does so. Removed its ability to drop geodes.
- Reworked the Axe of the Ancient Torrents into the Axe of the Sonorous Archives - it's now sculk themed, can vein mine leaves, and attempts to plant saplings from your inventory and grow them immediately in an area around you when continuously used. Also grows 2x2 trees like dark oak.
- Reworked the Shovel of the Perfect Machines into the Shovel of the Timeless Cascades - it's now prismarine themed and drains and places bodies of fluids, with a configurable capacity.
- Reworked the Crossbow of the Impending Doom into the Crossbow of the Stars Befall - it now excels at single target damage, dealing more damage the more times you hit the same enemy. It now shoots an ember projectile and applies Moongaze.
- Reworked the Crossbow of the Raging Volcano into the Crossbow of the Shattered Reflection - it now excels at crowd damage by shooting an ember ray that chains between nearby entities. It now applies Moongaze.
- Remade the crossbow models, they're now properly bulky.
- Fixed the vein-exchanging algorithm used by the Shovel of the Ineluctable Changes.
- Added the Tuning Cylinder and Aetheric Tuning augment, allowing any tool to drop geodes when breaking blocks.
- The Aetherium Crown now has a 3D model (with gem coloring), and has 3 application modes: Self (the wearer), Self & Friends (all players, animals, and npcs), and Hostiles (any hostile).
- Vessel gems now accept any potion, including those with multiple or custom effects (I.E. Turtle Master).
- Replaced aetherium ore with ancient aetherium meteorites whose old impact craters dot the landscape - search for their signature circular crater, or make an Aetheriometer, and you'll find them!
- Added Suevite, Cobbled Suevite, and Suevite bricks. Suevite is found in meteorites, and generated when aetherium aerosol meets water.

Credits:  
Sirplop: Current maintainer  
v0idwa1k3r: Original author

modrinthProject.title: Nature's Aura
modrinthProject.description: Collecting, using and replenishing the Aura naturally present in the world to create useful devices and unique mechanics
modrinthProject.body:
![A lot of the blocks from Nature's Aura lined up in a big display](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/cover.png?raw=true)

Nature's Aura is a mod about collecting, using and replenishing the Aura naturally present in the world to create useful devices and unique mechanics.

**_This mod requires [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)._**

Below are a couple of pictures and animations showing some of the features that Nature's Aura has to offer. **Of course, there is a lot more to discover than what is shown here!**

![The front page of the Book of Natural Aura](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/main/media/book.png)

The **Book of Natural Aura** guides players through the mod and its mechanics, slowly revealing more information about the mod by unlocking Advancements.

To create this book, simply combine the following items in any shape. All other recipes required in the mod will then be visible within it.

![The recipe for the Book of Natural Aura: Two pieces of paper, a piece of leather and a sapling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/main/media/recipe.png)

![The Ritual of the Forest](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/ritual_gif.gif?raw=true)

The **Ritual of the Forest** is a way of creating magical items using the power of nature.

![The Natural Altar creating Infused Iron](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/altar_gif.gif?raw=true)

The **Natural Altar** collects Aura from the environment to use for the creation of new materials like Infused Iron.

![The Furnace Heater powering a furnace smelting some stone](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/furnace_heater_gif.gif?raw=true)

The **Extraneous Firestarter** is a way of using Aura to your benefit: It collects it from the world and powers a furnace without needing any fuel.

![The Herbivorous Absorber consuming flowers around it to generate Aura](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/flower_generator_gif.gif?raw=true)

There are a lot of ways of creating Aura and feeding it back into the environment. Here, the **Herbivorous Absorber** is shown. Of course, Nature's Aura also adds means to automate procedures like this.

![An excess of Aura in the environment causing plants to get growth spurts](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/imbalance_positive_gif.gif?raw=true)

Creating an excess amount of Aura in the environment can cause positive environmental effects to occur, like this **Vegetational Increase**.

![Too little Aura causing grass and leaves to decay in the area](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/blob/main/media/imbalance_negative_gif.gif?raw=true)

Of course, having too little Aura in an area has negative effects on the environment. Here, **Natural Decay** is occuring.

For an even better overview, you should check out Mischief of Mice's video series on the mod:  
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=APE0UWPGBDM

Feel free to report any issues and suggestions on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/issues).

[![Join the Discord](https://ellpeck.de/res/discord)](https://ellpeck.de/discord)

[![Support me and get some cool visual rewards!](https://ellpeck.de/res/support.png)](https://ellpeck.de/support)

[![](https://ellpeck.de/res/nodecraft)](https://nodecraft.com/r/ellpeck)

modrinthProject.title: Ars Caelum
modrinthProject.description: A skyblock addon and compat for Ars Nouveau
modrinthProject.body:
# An addon for Ars Nouveau that enables full skyblock compatibility!

## Rituals
- **Ritual of Conjure Starter Island** - Creates an island from a configurable structure file. Used for map authors to allow players to build their island with a brazier.
- **Ritual of Sedimentation** - Generates cobblestone from water source blocks.
- **Ritual of Blazing/Vexing/Flourishing/Cascading Island** - Generates unique archwood islands, containing otherwise unobtainable resources. Used as milestone progressions.
- **Ritual of Elder Summon** - Summons waves of Guardians or Elder Guardian when augmented.
- **Ritual of Mana Regeneration** - Grants mana regen 1 to nearby players.
- **Ritual of Conjure Island: Deep Dark** - Creates an island of sculk, converting the area to Deep Dark.
- **Ritual of Conjure End Portal** - Creates an island containing the end portal.
- **Ritual of Conjure Geode** - Creates an amethyst geode.

## Recipes
- Crush now acts as a typical skyblock hammer and adds ore drops to cobblestone/gravel/sand loot tables.
- Heart of the sea recipe.
- Swift sneak enchantment recipes.

## How to Use
To play a full skyblock with the provided changes, players will need access to a water source (Conjure Water), Crush, and a Casting Item (book, wand, etc.). Glyphs can be configured in the Ars Nouveau configs.

## Ideas for Use
- Reduce player Regen and grant an early Ritual of Mana Regeneration. This forces the player to build a regeneration network early, or play around a central point to cast spells.
- Provide the Ritual of Sedimentation along with Crush and Conjure Water (set to Tier 1) for generating ores.
- Start the player on a small patch of land with a brazier and Tablet of Conjure Starter Island. You can change the starting structure with a datapack, or use the provided one with the above changes.
- Use Ars Nouveau's Conjure Island rituals to encourage the player to build grassy sky islands and biomes.

modrinthProject.title: Questlog
modrinthProject.description: Adds a quest system designed to make info conveyance in modpacks far more intuitive!
modrinthProject.body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_4b293d5f-4a73-4016-8144-2e34dbcd1008.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_b075f5b1-2af2-46a2-97f5-ed04a749d33d.png)

**Questlog** is a mod designed to add… Well, _quests_ to your game!

This mod is _entirely JSON-driven. You will_ need to learn how to write JSON files and put them in the questlog folder in the config to make use of it.

The biggest question on your mind is probably something like: "... Why not just use FTBQuests?"

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_9e24f0a0-6c85-4f19-9a88-ac26537da179.png)

Well! Unlike FTBQuests, which presents its quests in sprawling spreadsheets, _this_ mod's quests are presented in a little book/checklist-style format, and are directly highlighted via notification badges when unlocked from the inventory GUI! 

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1611/926/2026-04-03_09-24-53-png.png)

The presentation is both far more vanilla-friendly, yet also dynamic enough to be stylised in whatever way you see fit! This format was directly inspired by [Elder Scrolls: Oblivion](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N6hVmn9FM7o)'s quest system.

Although designed to fill in the gaps I feel are present in FTBQuests, I could easily see this mod being used in conjunction with it, as it fulfils different niches than that mod, even if they're similar. 

Whilst FBT is better for delivering numerous _smaller tasks_ (i.e. fetch-quests), Questlog is better for delivering information and highlighting more complex goals. It also just has a fair few advantages over FTB, too...

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_7131e988-6c46-4ff1-a500-9880efc0afb8.png)

The mod was conceptualised and is designed around the principle of **conveyance.** Creators can write quests so that when they trigger (or are completed), they display either their own toast panels and notification badges, **or** they outright _pop-up_ in your face directly, so you can never miss an important piece of info.

Every art asset of the mod has been scrupulously designed so as to be majorly alterable via **resource packs**, so you can include Questlog in all manner of modpacks without it feeling out of place.

By default, the mod has no content. You have to add your own via writing quests and adding them t!

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_e107db13-3af8-4ba1-89a9-70c952e76f27.png)

Check out the wiki for info on how to use Questlog!   
[https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/questlog/latest/docs](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/questlog/latest/docs)

You can also find example Quests to use as reference here:   
[https://github.com/infernalstudios/Questlog/tree/1.20.1/examples/questlog](https://github.com/infernalstudios/Questlog/tree/1.20.1/examples/questlog)

After examining that, check out this Questlog generator to more easily create your own quests:  
[https://evanbowness.dev/questlog.html](https://evanbowness.dev/questlog.html)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_0814af2e-19f6-4fd1-9c51-46d3ba649d3b.png)

Check out the mod in action in the [Resurvival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/resurvival) modpack, which I would suggest examining as a template to help you write your own quests and make your own resource packs!

Hope this helps you make better modpacks! :D

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1202066/description_1f76eec4-2ccf-43b5-ab2a-f32159b7a609.png)

Got a feature suggestion or an issue? Let us know on our GitHub! [https://github.com/infernalstudios/Questlog/issues](https://github.com/infernalstudios/Questlog/issues)

Also, show us what you do with the mod in our Discord! [https://discord.gg/UYGSn94](https://discord.gg/UYGSn94)

Wanna see the mod in action? _Can't read?_  
Don't worry, I've got you covered!! Check it out in action below!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fW0RZmdSBUM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

modrinthProject.body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/UQ8ZJYW.png)

Lodestone is a library used by all mods under the Lodestar team, containing important backend code mostly used for rendering.

#### **Features**:

A lot of shaders  
Various helper classes & utilities  
A simple screenshake implementation  
Some commonly used attributes in our mods  
A system allowing for custom fire effects applied to entities  
A particle system with a huge amount of per-particle configuration  
A simple system for multiblock structures & block entity inventory handlers  
A system for onscreen GUI-side particles with similar configuration to our other particle system  
A world event system, similar to entities but saved, rendered, and ticked per dimension, rather than per chunk  
A texture loader implementation; allowing for duplicating vanilla assets at a new directory during runtime. Also allows modifying the copied texture in various ways

...And more things we can't be bothered to write down!

![](https://i.imgur.com/GeluHCM.gif)

modrinthProject.title: Amendments
modrinthProject.description: Many changes to vanilla blocks
modrinthProject.body:
You can use this mod in your Modrinth Modpacks!



📖 About 📖

Amendments is a very configurable mod focused around tweaks to many of existing vanilla blocks.

The mod aim is to give more functionality and improve the visuals of many vanilla features without adding new ones.

The mod was born as a merge of some of our existing mods. As such you wont need to install them anymore. These are:

Carpeted stairs
Better Lilypads
Better Jukeboxes
Some Supplementaries features

Some of the mod most prominent features are:

 

Cauldron potion mixing
Wall Lanterns and Lantern Holding Animation
Skull Piles and Candle Skulls
Better Lectern GUI
 

 



🖼️ Features🖼️

Cauldrons

Can store ANY liquid
Can be used to Mix Potions and Dyes
When clicked on will attempt to craft the item in your hand with the liquid they contain
Have improved animations with splash and bubble particles when falling on as well as missing sounds
When holding water or a potion can Boil if they have a heat source below
Boiling cauldrons can inflict boiling damage
Stepping into a splash or lingering potion cauldron will apply that potion
Improved model with Translucency and Ambient Occlusion
 

Lecterns

When holding a Book and Quill will have a new GUI that adds a Quill button and an Ink Well button
Click on the Ink Well to cycle between available font colors
Click on the Quill to cycle between available fonts
Can now interact with hoppers!
 

Lanterns

Have a new 3D animation when held in hand
Works both in first and third person
Can be hung on walls. Works with ANY lantern
When hanging will have pendulum physics!
 

Hanging Signs

Can hold any item on both their faces
Can also display a banner patterns (requires Supplementaries)
When attached to walls will swing with physics!
Will display a visual connection when attached to fence, walls or similar blocks
 

Jukeboxes

Now visually show the disc they are playing
They come with new and improved model
Disc show will also spin while it's playing
Works with ANY disc, modded or not

Carpets
Can be placed on Slabs
Can be placed on Stairs
Same goes for moss carpets

Cakes
Can be stacked by placing two ontop of eachother. Works with ANY cake
Vanilla cakes can also be rotated
 

Lilypads

Can have any block placed on them
This works by making them occupy the block below, turning them into a waterlogged block
Will revert back when the block is removed
Can be made to work with any lilypad (feedback needed)
 

Mob Skulls

Can be stacked. Works with ANY skull in any combination
Can have candles placed ontop
Candle will leave a wax overlay on the skull
 

Brewing Stands

Now will have their potion bottles colored according to what they are holding
 

Banners &  Pots

Can be placed on ceilings

Bells
Can visually connect to chains and ropes below them
Can be ring by clicking chairn / rope below them
 



❤️Support Me❤️

# LibX

LibX is a library mod that contains a lot of code used by other mods.

As a player it also offers some useful commands accessible through `/libx <name>`.

If you want to use LibX for your own mod, see the [GitHub page](https://github.com/ModdingX/LibX#libx).

**It is highly recommended to use the versions marked as release to play the game whenever possible.**

modrinthProject.body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/) **[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)** ![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/skyblock-builder/header.png)
![Ultimate Tool](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/skyblock-builder/ultimate_tool.png)
This mod allows you to create custom skyblock islands via config. You simply create a schematic file using the structure block from vanilla Minecraft, or the Structure Saver item and set possible spawn points for the island. This mod is required on server and client side. It adds a "Skyblock" world type at "More World Options..." setting when creating a new world on client side. For servers, use `skyblockbuilder:custom_skyblock` (1.18+: `skyblockbuilder:skyblock`) as world type in server.properties or in forge-common.toml (config, was removed in 1.19).

This mod requires [LibX](https://modrinth.com/mod/libx). Help translating the mod here on [One Sky](https://oss5m9q.oneskyapp.com/admin/project/dashboard/project/177200).

![Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/skyblock-builder/overview.png) *A bit low and German, but maybe helpful*

For more information, please visit the [Wiki](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/swl/skyblock-builder/) linked above. You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like. ![[Werbung](https://www.bisecthosting.com/melanx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/skyblock-builder/promo.png) #Werbung #Ad

modrinthProject.description: Change the default world type for creating a new world in Create World screen
modrinthProject.body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/)
**[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)**
## Mainly for modpack creators

With this mod you can set the world type which is selected by default when creating a new world.

Example: you have [Skyblock Builder](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-builder) installed and set the value in the client config to `skyblockbuilder:skyblock`. When creating a new world, the user don't need to change the world type for itself to that type.

With this, accidently generating the wrong world will not happen. Or it's just less possible.

The mod is **client only**. For servers, you should just provide the right `servers.properties`, or use [Default Server Properties](https://modrinth.com/mod/default-server-properties)

The mod generates a file with allowed config values once you enter the Create New World screen.

You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like.
